nodes.label: AI as time-saving documentation tool
nodes.grounding_span: Notes would take upwards of 40 minutes to complete after a session. With using AI, even with reviewing and changing some details that were misinterpreted, notes now take about 5-10 minutes.

nodes.label: AI accuracy in specialized context
nodes.label_negative: AI misinterpretation due to domain mismatch
nodes.grounding_span: The AI was designed for human healthcare, so the niche market of canine rehab does have some struggles. For example, if we are talking about Range of Motion, the AI thinks if we say 180° then it must be a mistake

nodes.label: AI customization and adaptability
nodes.grounding_span: I hope that going forward more products allow for that type of customization to make the products more useful, especially for our purposes where we aren't using the same lingo as a typical healthcare worker.

nodes.label: AI integration across systems
nodes.grounding_span: Having one integrated program would save a lot of the duplicate work of saving the notes to the appointment as well as the client file

nodes.label: AI adoption and team alignment
nodes.grounding_span: only half of us really like the AI and see its benefit. Others do not use it to it's potential.

nodes.label: AI as admin streamliner vs core work
nodes.grounding_span: AI will not be able to replace the work that I do, working with dogs, but it can streamline the admin side of the business incredibly.

nodes.label: Accuracy and reliability in documentation
nodes.grounding_span: We have to correct that manually when we are reviewing our notes after a session

nodes.label: Seamless workflow integration
nodes.grounding_span: Having one integrated program would save a lot of the duplicate work

nodes.label: Team productivity and consistency
nodes.grounding_span: Those of us who are on board with the AI and know how to use it have tried to teach them how much more efficient they could be

nodes.label: Focus on core therapeutic work
nodes.grounding_span: The more time I have to help clients and not do the paperwork, the better for everyone

nodes.label: Frustration with AI misinterpretation
nodes.grounding_span: The AI was designed for human healthcare, so the niche market of canine rehab does have some struggles.

nodes.label: Desire for better customization
nodes.grounding_span: I hope that going forward more products allow for that type of customization

nodes.label: Frustration with fragmented systems
nodes.grounding_span: Having one integrated program would save a lot of the duplicate work

nodes.label: Frustration with team resistance
nodes.grounding_span: they either don't understand or are reluctant to change

nodes.label: Confidence in AI's role as admin tool
nodes.grounding_span: AI will not be able to replace the work that I do, working with dogs, but it can streamline the admin side

nodes.label: Real-time narration and description during work
nodes.grounding_span: We wear microphones and describe each step of what we are doing

nodes.label: Trial-and-error template development
nodes.grounding_span: Right now it is a trial and error approach that can take a lot of time, until the template is achieved.
